info.title: Rift SDK Wrapper API
info.description:
HTTP wrapper around the Rift Finance Wallet SDK (`@rift-finance/wallet`). Mirrors the SDK's services as REST endpoints so consumers can use Rift from any language. Every endpoint requires an `X-API-Key` header (the project's `sk_...` key). Most user-facing endpoints additionally require an `Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>` header, where `accessToken` is obtained from `/api/v1/auth/login`, `/api/v1/auth/google`, or `/api/v1/auth/apple`.

**Timeout & retry policy**: the wrapper holds requests to upstream for up to 120s (mobile-money STK push can take 30-90s). Internal retries are disabled — if a request 5xxs, the caller should decide whether retrying is safe (most operations are non-idempotent; retrying signup/transactions can produce duplicates).

**Error envelope**: failures return `{ "error": "<message>" }` with an appropriate HTTP status. HTML responses from upstream (e.g. Cloudflare 502 pages) are sanitised before being returned.

tags.name: Recovery
tags.description: Account recovery methods — set up, list, update, delete, and password reset flows.

tags.name: Wallet
tags.description: Token and chain balances for the authenticated user.

tags.name: Transactions
tags.description: Send crypto, fetch history, calculate fees.

tags.name: Signer
tags.description: Sign and send arbitrary transactions / messages via the user's smart wallet (ERC-4337).

tags.name: Assets
tags.description: Supported chains and tokens (Rift catalogue + per-user holdings).

tags.name: Offramp
tags.description: Crypto -> fiat (KES via Pretium; NGN/UGX/GHS/ETB/CDF/TZS/MWK/BRL via Paycrest).

tags.name: Onramp
tags.description: Fiat -> crypto purchases via mobile money / bank transfer.

tags.name: Merchant
tags.description: Invoice creation, listing, and merchant KYB status.

tags.name: WalletConnect
tags.description: Pair with DApps over WalletConnect v2, manage sessions and requests.

tags.name: Deposits
tags.description: Historical on-chain USDC deposits seen by the Rift indexer.

tags.name: User Management
tags.description: Project admin: suspend/unsuspend users, list suspended users.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Project API key (`sk_...`). Required on every endpoint.

BearerAuth.description: User access token (ES256 JWT) returned by `/auth/login`, `/auth/google`, or `/auth/apple`. Required on user-scoped endpoints.

ChainPathParam.name: chainId
ChainPathParam.description: Chain id, e.g. `8453` (Base), `137` (Polygon). String, not numeric.

TokenIdPathParam.name: tokenId
TokenIdPathParam.description: Composite token id in the form `CHAINNAME-SYMBOL`, e.g. `BASE-USDC`.

Error.description: Standard error envelope returned by every wrapper endpoint on failure. The original upstream error is sanitised — HTML pages and overly long stack traces are truncated.

SignupRequest.description: Either externalId+password OR email/phoneNumber. displayName recommended.

LoginRequest.description: One of three shapes: (email + otpCode), (phoneNumber + otpCode), or (externalId + password). Send `/otp/send` first if using OTP.

accessToken.description: ES256 JWT — pass as `Authorization: Bearer ...` on subsequent calls.

idToken.description: Google ID token (JWT) from Google Identity Services on the client (One-Tap credential or `useGoogleLogin({ flow: 'implicit' })`).

referrer.description: Optional referral code propagated to the new user on first sign-in.

idToken.description: Apple identity token (`authorization.id_token` from `AppleID.auth.signIn()` on web, identity token from `ASAuthorizationAppleIDCredential` on iOS).

displayName.description: First+last name composed by the client. Apple only delivers this on the FIRST sign-in — capture and forward then.

OtpRequest.description: Provide either email or phone, not both.

autoSwapEnabled.description: Auto-bridge incoming USDC/USDT to the target chain.

TransactionRequest.description: Plus ONE auth shape: (externalId+password) OR (phoneNumber+otpCode) OR (email+otpCode).

value.description: Amount in human units (e.g. '10' for 10 USDC).

intent.description: Optional intent hint for fee estimation.

recipient.description: Optional - defaults to user's smart wallet on the destination chain.

SwapRequest.description: Same-chain token swap. Use `flow: gasless` for UserOp-sponsored gas, `normal` for direct payment.

token_to_sell_address.description: ERC-20 contract - only for arbitrary tokens not in the SDK list.

isEth.description: True if selling native ETH (not WETH).

isBuyingEth.description: True if buying native ETH (not WETH).

amount.description: USDC amount - required to get feeBreakdown.

type.description: Use 'offramp' for selling crypto, 'onramp' for buying - they have different rates.

buying_rate.description: OFFRAMP rate - fiat per USDC when cashing out.

selling_rate.description: ONRAMP rate - fiat per USDC when buying crypto.

PayRequest.description: Either `amount` (USDC to spend) or `localAmount` (exact fiat payout) must be set. `recipient` is a JSON-stringified object whose shape depends on the currency - see description on the endpoint.

amount.description: Local fiat amount (e.g. 1000 = 1000 KES), NOT USDC.

refund_account.description: Paycrest: refund account if the conversion fails.

BuyResponse.description: Pretium and Paycrest return different shapes - both are valid.

subscriberId.description: Unique device/subscriber id (e.g. Webpushr subscriber id).

uri.description: WalletConnect v2 URI starting with wc:

SendTransactionRequest.description: Executes a call through the user's smart wallet as an ERC-4337 UserOperation. Sender = smart wallet, signer = EOA owner. Pass `paymasterToken` (ERC-20 address) to pay gas in a token; omit for sponsored gas.

paymasterToken.description: ERC-20 contract to pay gas in. Omit for sponsored gas.

SendTransactionResponse.description: Returns a UserOperation hash (NOT a classic Ethereum tx hash). Track with a bundler-aware explorer like jiffyscan.xyz/userOpHash/<hash>.

transactionHash.description: Classic tx hash when the SDK can disambiguate (e.g. on Lisk).

SuspendUserRequest.description: Provide ONE user identifier and ONE project-owner identifier.

Unauthorized.description: Missing or invalid X-API-Key (and/or Authorization header on user-scoped routes).

BadRequest.description: Validation failure - invalid input, missing required field, or upstream rejected the call.

ServerError.description: Wrapper or upstream server error. Errors include a sanitised message (HTML pages are normalised).

post.summary: Create a new wallet account
post.description: Creates a Rift wallet account scoped to the project identified by the X-API-Key. Use either externalId+password OR email/phoneNumber. The new user does NOT have a session - call `/auth/login` next.

post.summary: Authenticate and receive a bearer token
post.description: Returns an `accessToken` (ES256 JWT) to use as `Authorization: Bearer ...` on all subsequent user-scoped requests. Three auth shapes supported - see request schema.

post.summary: Sign in with Google
post.description: Sign in or sign up on first use with a Google ID token. Once an account is bound to Google, password/OTP login is rejected for that account - the user must continue using Google.

post.summary: Sign in with Apple
post.description: Sign in or sign up on first use with an Apple identity token. Apple only delivers the user's email and name on the FIRST sign-in - pass `displayName` then. Apple-bound accounts are NOT locked to Apple; email/OTP login still works for users with a non-relay email.

post.summary: Send an OTP via SMS or email
Verify an OTP code (no session created)
post.description: Useful for standalone OTP confirmation. For login, use `/auth/login` directly - it verifies the OTP AND issues a session in one round-trip.

put.description: Use to change displayName, email, phone, notification email, payment account, or to toggle auto-swap.

delete.summary: Permanently delete the authenticated user's account
delete.description: Destructive - confirms via OTP or password. Clears the user's bearer token server-side.

post.summary: Client-side logout (clears wrapper's bearer cache)
post.description: Local-only: tells the wrapper's SDK instance to drop its bearer token. Does NOT invalidate the token server-side. Discard the token on the client too.

post.summary: Set up account recovery methods
post.description: Adds email and/or phone as recovery channels for an externalId+password account.

get.description: Public - for users who can't log in. Returns masked email/phone so the caller can let the user pick a delivery channel.

post.summary: Request a password reset OTP
post.description: Sends an OTP to the chosen recovery channel. No session required.

target.description: Recovery destination that received the OTP.

post.summary: Complete password reset
Add a single recovery method

put.summary: Update the value of an existing recovery method

post.summary: List the authenticated user's recovery methods

get.summary: Get balance of a specific token (optionally filtered by chain)
Get all token balances on a chain (or across all chains)

post.summary: Send crypto
post.description: Real transaction - always confirm with the user first. Requires re-auth (OTP or password) in the body in addition to the bearer token.

post.summary: Get wallet instance info for a chain
Sign a transaction without broadcasting it
Execute a call via the user's smart wallet as an ERC-4337 UserOperation
post.description: On-chain sender is the SMART WALLET, signed by the EOA owner. Returns a UserOperation hash - NOT a classic tx hash. Do not link as `etherscan.io/tx/<hash>`; use a bundler-aware explorer (jiffyscan.xyz). Gas is sponsored by default; pass `paymasterToken` (ERC-20) to pay in a token.

post.summary: Sign an arbitrary message (off-chain auth, DApp signatures, etc.)

get.summary: List supported tokens on a specific chain
List tokens the authenticated user holds
Get token details by composite id

get.description: When `?active=true`, returns only chains where the authenticated user has active balances (bearer required). Without it, returns the Rift catalogue (public).

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: Set to true to filter to chains with active user balances.

get.summary: Get available bridge routes and supported tokens

post.summary: Get a quote for a bridge transfer
Execute a cross-chain bridge transfer
post.description: Tokens arrive in 1-5 minutes. No OTP needed for bridge.

post.summary: Swap one token for another on a single chain
post.description: Same-chain only - use `/bridge/execute` for cross-chain. No OTP required.

post.summary: Preview exchange rate (and optional fee breakdown)
post.description: Pass `type: 'offramp'` for cashing out, `'onramp'` for buying. Always pair with an `amount` to get a meaningful feeBreakdown.

get.summary: Get supported institutions for a currency
get.description: Returns banks, mobile-money networks, and the bankCode/institution strings used in `/offramp/pay` recipient JSON.

post.summary: Email/SMS an existing payment link to recipient(s)
post.description: Does NOT create a payment - delivers an existing URL. At least one of `recipientEmail` or `recipientPhone` is required.

post.summary: Execute an offramp (crypto -> fiat) payment
post.description:
Real payment - confirm with user. Long-running: can take 30-60+ seconds (on-chain tx + fiat settlement). A timeout does NOT mean failure - poll `/offramp/poll_order_status` with the returned `transactionCode`.

Recipient JSON shapes per currency (stringify the object and put in `recipient`):
- **KES (M-Pesa)**: `{"type":"MOBILE","accountIdentifier":"+254...","institution":"Safaricom"}`
- **KES (Paybill)**: `{"type":"PAYBILL","accountIdentifier":"shortcode","accountNumber":"acct","institution":"Safaricom"}`
- **NGN (bank)**: `{"bankCode":"GTBINGLA","accountIdentifier":"0123456789","accountName":"Name","institution":"GTBank"}`
- **UGX (mobile)**: `{"bankCode":"MOMOUGPC","accountIdentifier":"+256...","accountName":"Name","institution":"MTN"}`
- **GHS (mobile)**: `{"bankCode":"MOMOGHPC","accountIdentifier":"+233...","accountName":"Name","institution":"MTN"}`
- **ETB (mobile)**: `{"bankCode":"TELEBPC","accountIdentifier":"+251...","accountName":"Name","institution":"Telebirr"}`
- **TZS (mobile)**: `{"bankCode":"TIGOTZPC","accountIdentifier":"+255...","accountName":"Name","institution":"Vodacom"}`
- **BRL (PIX)**: `{"bankCode":"PIXKBRPC","accountIdentifier":"pix_key","accountName":"Name","institution":"pix"}`

post.summary: Create an offramp order (legacy - prefer /offramp/pay)
Get the raw KES buy/sell spread (diagnostic only)
post.description: Do NOT use to show users their withdrawal fee. Use `/offramp/preview_exchange_rate` with an amount and `type: 'offramp'` instead - that returns the real fee in `feeBreakdown`.

get.summary: Poll the status of an offramp order
List all offramp orders for the user

post.summary: Buy crypto with mobile money / bank transfer
post.description: Pretium for KES; Paycrest for the rest. The `amount` is in LOCAL FIAT, not USDC. No OTP required.

post.summary: Get the status of a crypto purchase

get.summary: Get onramp purchase history for a user

post.summary: Generate a KYC verification token / URL
post.description: Returns a SmileID or Sumsub verification URL the user must visit. Public - no bearer required.

post.summary: Check if a user exists and their KYC status
Check KYC verification status
Poll KYC status and send OTP once verified
Server-to-server KYC verification check by jobId

get.summary: Poll a specific KYC job's status

post.summary: Create an invoice and get a payment URL

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Optional - check a specific user instead of the authenticated user.

post.summary: Register a device for push notifications
Unsubscribe a device

delete.summary: Delete ALL notification subscriptions for the user

post.summary: Send a test notification to one subscriber
Send a notification to ALL of the user's subscribers
Pair with a DApp via a wc: URI
Approve a pending DApp request
Reject a pending DApp request

get.summary: Get on-chain USDC deposits seen by the indexer

post.summary: Suspend a user
Unsuspend a user

get.summary: Check whether a specific user is suspended
